name: Sugar Crusted Sweet Potato Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup canned or cooked sweet potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Spray a cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Sift flour into a bowl and combine it with baking powder, salt, and 4 tablespoons of brown sugar. Mix well.
3. Using a pastry blender or your fingers, cut in shortening until the mixture is crumbly.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, sweet potatoes, and sour cream. Add the flour mixture all at once and stir until just moistened. If the dough is too dry, add additional milk, 1 teaspoon at a time, until it is combined.
5. Form each biscuit by dropping about 1/4 cup of dough onto the prepared cookie sheet. Sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons of brown sugar on top of each biscuit.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the tops and bottoms are golden brown. Remove from the oven immediately and serve warm.
Serving size: 1
Calories: 150
Protein: 4g
Fat: 1g
Cholesterol: 2mg
Carbohydrates: 8g
